title: Floating Bottom Navigation with BlurView, Gradient Active Tab & Safe Area Support

requirements.text: Redesign the bottom navigation bar in BottomNavigation.tsx and StaffAppLayout.tsx (and PatientAppLayout.tsx) into a floating container that is positioned fixed at the bottom with 16–20px horizontal margin, 12–16px bottom margin, and borderRadius: 24. The container must not scroll with content, must not allow content to overlap it, and must respect safe area insets on both iOS and Android.

quotes: Make the bottom navigation a floating container with 16–20px horizontal margin and 12–16px bottom margin
Must not allow content to overlap

acceptanceCriteria: Bottom nav floats above page content with visible horizontal and bottom margins
Nav stays fixed at the bottom while scrolling page content
Page content does not slide behind the nav bar
Safe area insets are respected on notched iOS devices and Android devices with gesture navigation

requirements.text: Apply a frosted-glass background to the floating bottom navigation using a BlurView component (intensity 60–80, tint: 'light'). Add a fallback solid background of rgba(255,255,255,0.9) for environments where BlurView is not supported. Add a subtle border (borderWidth: 1, borderColor: rgba(255,255,255,0.3)) and a soft shadow (shadowColor: #000, shadowOpacity: 0.08, shadowRadius: 12, shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 6 }, elevation: 10 for Android).

quotes: Use BlurView (Expo Blur) for background with: intensity: 60–80, tint: 'light'
Add fallback solid background color #FFFFFF with slight transparency (rgba(255,255,255,0.9)) if BlurView is not supported
Add subtle border: borderWidth: 1, borderColor: rgba(255,255,255,0.3)
Add soft shadow: shadowColor: #000, shadowOpacity: 0.08, shadowRadius: 12, shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 6 }, elevation: 10 (Android)

acceptanceCriteria: BlurView renders a visible frosted-glass blur behind the nav bar at intensity 60–80
If BlurView is unavailable the nav bar shows rgba(255,255,255,0.9) background
A subtle 1px semi-transparent white border is visible around the nav container
A soft drop shadow (opacity 0.08, radius 12, offset y:6) is visible below the nav bar

requirements.text: Style the active tab in the bottom navigation with a soft gradient pill background using colors #0D47A1 → #26C6DA, a white icon, and a slight scale animation (scale 1.05–1.1). Inactive tab icons should use color #94A3B8. Add a smooth transition animation when switching between tabs.

quotes: Slight scale animation on active tab (scale 1.05–1.1)
Add smooth transition animation when switching tabs.

acceptanceCriteria: Active tab shows a visible gradient pill (#0D47A1 to #26C6DA) behind the icon/label
Active tab animates to scale 1.05–1.1 when selected
Switching tabs produces a smooth animated transition with no flicker or jump

requirements.text: Preserve all existing role-based visibility logic in the bottom navigation (roleNavConfig-driven nav items per role). Do not break any existing routing. Ensure there is no layout shift or content flicker while scrolling with the new floating nav in place.

quotes: Ensure no layout shift or flicker while scrolling.

acceptanceCriteria: Each role (patient, phlebotomist, lab admin, super admin) still sees only their role-specific nav items
All existing routes navigate correctly when tapped
No layout shift or transparency glitch occurs while scrolling page content

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not alter backend logic or data models
Do not break existing role-based routing or shift-guard behaviour
All user-facing text must remain in English
nonGoals: Adding new navigation routes or tabs
Changing the header or any non-navigation layout components
